{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Judgment of the Phantom Queen
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]]'s [[Judgment of the Phantom Queen]] was one of her most prized techniques.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
